pinterest.title: Magnetic Resonance Imaging: Revolutionizing Medical Diagnostics Without Radiation
pinterest.description: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is a non-invasive medical imaging technique that uses strong magnetic fields and radio waves to generate detailed images of organs and soft tissues within the body. Unlike X-rays or CT scans, it does not use ionizing radiation, making it safer for repeated use.
